acceptedAnswer.text: Eight weighted categories — research, talent, investment, infrastructure, policy, PQC security, environmental sustainability and ethics — scored quarterly by a neutral AI jury against a published rubric. A country-data agent gathers evidence and weighs submissions.
Yes. IQCDL endorses no platform or hardware vendor. The criteria serve standards (NIST, ISO/IEC, IEEE, EU PQC) and learners — not commercial interests.

mainEntity.name: How often is the index refreshed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Quarterly. A dedicated editorial agent compiles each edition and a distribution agent makes it available to press, partners and the public.
